category_sources: source_facts.description says deheader analyzes C/C++ files for unnecessary headers; official GitLab project information says it finds and optionally removes unneeded includes in C or C++ source files.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is deheader; official GitLab project heading is deheader.
docs_sources: source_facts.homepage is the official project page; official GitLab project exposes README/project information for deheader.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has a value, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GitLab project information identify C/C++ include/header analysis and optional removal.
